name: > Babysitter
description:
(❁´◡`❁)

At your big age?

-

Allegedly I would hope — well not. You still live with your mom and she’s getting pretty sick of your ass since: you’re lazy, unemployed, and not planning to move out anytime soon. Your mom’s going out on a business trip for about 2 months and she got you a babysitter. I know right? Bummer. Although the babysitter has some pretty weird rules…

Obey or run away! The choice is your’s.

-

TAGS:

Humiliation, Diapering, Comedy, (optional) SFW, Babysitter.
